user.title: Electron Chain – Energy Sharing
user.description: Connect this Home Assistant to a §42c cooperative on the peaq blockchain. The wallet seed is encrypted at rest with a passphrase you choose.

reauth_confirm.title: Unlock Electron Chain wallet
reauth_confirm.description: Enter the passphrase for {coop} / {household} to decrypt the wallet seed for this session.

adapter_pick.title: Choose your battery / solar device
adapter_pick.description: Select the device adapter. Items marked '✓ detected' have compatible HA entities already present.

adapter_bind.title: Confirm entity bindings — {model}
adapter_bind.description: Pinned entities for the {vendor} adapter ({n_detected} auto-detected). Adjust if needed; leave empty fields blank.

error.too_short: Passphrase must be at least 6 characters
error.encryption_failed: Could not encrypt the wallet seed
error.decryption_failed: Could not decrypt the wallet seed

abort.no_encrypted_seed: No encrypted wallet seed on file for this entry
abort.reauth_successful: Wallet seed unlocked for this session
